label: 2022 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
race_name: Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres

transcript.clean_text: beautiful weather if a little chilly for the one hundred and sixth running of the tour of flounders teleport gotcha on hand matty van der pol casper asgreen amongst the favorites in a spectacular roster of riders that sadly did not include van out he covered compromised like so many well a long run of just over 100 kilometers before we got to our first section of parave and then of course the sequence of climbs that characterized this race ending with the ode acquirement which has to be taken three times on the day and the paterberg announcing those last 13 kilometers a long way before we got there well a nine rider breakaway we had wigner vanderhorn devolve boarow bowley canter motato passions and de vilde it left a lot of the favorites of course in their wake but the gap was a modest one at this point danny pikachu finding himself on the deck i guess getting his bad luck out of the way early he would hope and our breakaway built up a margin of no more than five minutes it was being held in abeyance there were some chases felix gross decided to impose himself likewise affini vermont there were a few others that thought about it and then into the climbs the mollenberg riders getting eager out there van hoydonk and koch deciding that they would try and engage the chase well there are a few incarnations some comings together as well in a good way the battle was raging on van hoydonk doing a good job but the nerves were still there within the pack another crash another day another bruise to carry home for christophe laporte thais bernout and he elevated to higher status in the absence of wild van art well the luxembourg champion kevin genetz was also involved as the groups came together and as they did tanya pikachu had kept himself quiet mattia trentin had done a lot of work suddenly went loud with 54 kilometers to go on his wheel casper a screen and we're asking ourselves where is matthew van der paul of alps in phoenix out of position and desperate to make amends he powered into that gap well any gaps that were opening up here could prove to be significant and with a light breeze and the climbs taking a a toll then the gaps were indeed starting to open up and display themselves so was the talent on the paterberg track accelerating over the top fred wright dylan van baal and so to the coppenberg mean percentages and some fantastic racing as well well van der pol was busy digging in valentine madawas decided to join the fun as well they were using the gullies trying to smooth out some of the cobbles out there but pagatcha constantly was the hammer blow everyone else the anvil it seemed trying to stay in touch great work by madawas and vanderpol it was a select group and suddenly we were talking about just three up front well this is going to beg a chase of sorts but how effective would it be at the head of the race with 24 kilometers to go telly pagacio was there in a very select group of five but for how much longer he decided to turn on the power yet again and that last little duel sequence the owner claremont and the paderberg it was the two pre-race favorites telly pakacha and matthew van der pol found themselves together what was a handsome gap they built up as well and never say die attitude from the pursuers though meant that this tale was far from told we thought at this moment it would be that pogacchia would finally break the link with van der pol but van der pol doggedly dug in to stay with well then we were wondering about how the finale would pass we went underneath the flam rouge refusing to take a turn talibukacha and the others were starting to encroach this was looking dangerous well dylan vampire was coming so was madawas and as vanderpoll accelerated locked in with nowhere to go telling pikachu from a winning position potentially he was to finish off the podium vanderpoll making it two wins out of the last three remarkable as indeed was the belief of dylan van baal who crossed the line in second place and madawas who got a podium where was pogatcha wounded he didn't want to talk to anyone vanderpoll victorious absolutely spectacular madawa's going for the barriers disturbed i guess pagacha they all had their own race to win potentially and van baal it was that locked out the other side of the road one clear run for home it had to be fought for and van der pol got there what a remarkable finale and for all the complaints from teddy pacquacher he'll think that fourth place maybe on his debut in this race was not so bad after all could have been a win though stefan kung rounding out the top five dylan turns fred wright mads patterson christophe laporte and the veteran alexander kristoff spectacular it was and a great winner what a race this always turns out to be it never disappoints
